name: Midnight Alert
short_description: Arming yourself against these creatures doesn’t mean you’re safe from the horrors that lurk around every corner.
detailed_description:
A Horror FPS That Will Test Your Nerves.

You wake up in a world that has changed forever. A priest, obsessed with forbidden knowledge, performed a ritual that actually worked—opening the gates of hell and unleashing chaos. Now, survival is your only goal in a place where creatures and humans can no longer coexist.

Creatures everywhere

They could come from any direction. Stay alert, keep your weapons ready, and protect yourself at all costs.

A Haunting Atmosphere

Arming yourself won’t be enough. The dread runs deeper. The world is dark, tense, and filled with horrors that don’t care how prepared you are.

Every hallway, every shadow hides a threat—and sometimes, it’s not the creatures that scare you most.

Intense gameplay and boss fights

Face off against relentless enemies and terrifying bosses. You’ll need skill, strategy, and a strong aim to survive.

Nightmare Mode

No checkpoints. Stronger enemies. No mercy. If you’re brave enough, Nightmare Mode will push you to your limits.

Weapon Customization

Find and equip mods to personalize your weapons. Adjust color, add attachments like scopes, flashlights, muzzles, bullet extensions, lasers, and more.

Interactive Environments

Explore and interact with your surroundings. You might discover useful items—or unsettling secrets.

Quality Settings

Adjust a wide range of visual settings to match your system. Supports 4K resolution and beyond for an immersive experience.

Keymapping and Controller Support

Remap keys and tune camera sensitivity to fit your playstyle. Full controller support included.

Multiple Saving and Loading

Create and switch between different playthroughs without losing progress. No two runs need to be the same.
